title: An Interactive Look at the Geology of the Driftless Area
author: Miles Sterner
popup_alt_text: 2d map showing geology of the driftless area in Southeast Minnesota.
description: Group project I completed as my final project for GIS 5574 (WebGIS). The linked StoryMaps page includes a 3D representation and 2D spatial model of the stratigraphic layers underlying portions of the driftless area in Houston County, MN. Information on the geologic characteristics and fossilized material found within each stratigraphic layer is provided based on selections in the interactive models. Additional info is given pertaining to the geologic history of the driftless area and how such a unique landscape came to exist in the Midwestern United States.
